name: error-handling
scope: Swallowed errors and empty catch/except blocks
Ignored error returns and discarded error values
Silent fallbacks returning defaults without logging or propagation
Overly broad catching (bare except, untyped catch)
hard_rules: Broad except Exception: without re-raise in Python
should_rules: Silent fallback returns (return None, return default) without logging
Errors returned without context (bare return err in Go)
Catch returns default without logging in TypeScript
warn_rules: Errors only logged but not propagated
